text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To better understand her new rival, Tokai Teio,
Mihono Bourbon watches old footage and learns
her history of victories and upsets.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Anxious about Tokai Teio's comeback, she goes
to the track to clear her mind, only to find Tokai
Teio there.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All her anxiety was for naught. Seeing Tokai Teio
training with such passion and vigor instills her
with courage.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After being awed by Tokai Teio's ability to inspire
courage in others, she sets out to train with
renewed drive.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As for Tokai Teio, she has been following Mihono
Bourbon's success and views her as a new rival as
well.
